* Data files: generated vs external

This summarizes which data files are created by our tools and which come from outside inputs. Paths use =<base_dir>= and =<profile>= as defined by =tools/profile.py=.

** Generated by our scripts/tools

- =<base_dir>/<profile>/word-index.tsv=
  - Producer: =tools/build_word_index.py= (prints to stdout; you typically redirect).
  - Typical command: ~python -m cli.build_word_index <inputs...> > <base_dir>/<profile>/word-index.tsv~
  - Format: =word	freq	glen=
  - Notes: Contents are aggregated from your external input files; file itself is an artifact generated by our script.

- =<base_dir>/<profile>/batches/*.tsv=
  - Producer: GUI (=tools/gui_qt_app.py=, =MainWindow.commit_edits=).
  - Trigger: When you press “Commit”; saves only rows whose “splits” were edited.
  - Filename pattern: ={timestamp}-{prefix}-{length_spec}-{suffix}.tsv=
  - Format (header): =id	word	splits	freq	glen	notes=

- =<base_dir>/<profile>/ledger.tsv=
  - Producer: GUI (=tools/gui_qt_app.py=, =MainWindow.update_ledger=).
  - Trigger: On Commit; appends one line per saved (edited) row.
  - Format (header): =timestamp	batch	id	word	splits	notes=

- =data/ui-log.tsv=
  - Producer: GUI (=tools/gui_qt_app.py=, =MainWindow.log_ui_event=).
  - Trigger: On UI actions (see “UI events logged” below).
  - Format (header): =timestamp	event_type	parameters=
  - Note: This log is repo-global in =data/= (not profile-scoped).

- =<out_path>= (user-specified)
  - Producer: =tools/export_dataset.py=.
  - Trigger: When you run the exporter to create a training dataset from the ledger.
  - Command: ~python -m tools.export_dataset --profile <name> --base_dir <dir> --out <out_path>~
  - Format (header): =word	splits=

** External inputs (supplied by you; not generated by this repo)

- Corpora/files used to build the word index
  - Consumer: =tools/build_word_index.py=
  - Examples (as referenced in =VARALARU.org= or typical workflows): =words.clean.tsv=, =words.clean.sorted.tsv=, =suffix-sorted.csv=, files under =tharavu/lengthwise/=.
  - Notes: These are prepared outside this project. Our script reads them, aggregates frequencies, computes grapheme lengths via =arichuvadi=, and emits the consolidated =word-index.tsv=.

** Current UI events logged (into =data/ui-log.tsv=)

- =QUERY=: when you press Query (parameters: =prefix=, =suffix=, =regex=, =length_spec=, =limit=).
- =EDIT=: first time a row’s “splits” (col 2) is modified from its original; cleared if reverted.
- =REPLACE=: when “Apply Replace” modifies any “splits” cells (parameters include =find=, =replace=, =cells_modified=).
- =SORT=: on any sort action (type recorded, e.g., =prefix=, =suffix=, =length_and_suffix=, or custom lambda).
- =COMMIT=: when saving; parameters include =batch= and =saved_rows= (only edited rows are written).
